name: Older Sister's Friend - Paying a Debt
description:
"Heads or Ass?"

Bio: When ushering around your sisters older friend to school for a while, she realizes she forgot the gas money she owes you. Since she was behind a couple weeks, she gets the naughty idea of paying back her debt another way, by either giving you head, or letting you have her ass. Your choice.
creator: yandhi
